case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LINDA HUSARY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT HUSARY, LINDA
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT HUSARY, LINDA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: RUCH, TONY SUBSTITUTED FOR TORRES, FRANCISCO G. AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT HUSARY, LINDA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LINDA HUSARY'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES (PER DIEM FEES). LINDA HUSARY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HUSARY, LINDA MCFARLAND, CARLEY ANTHONY DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
